description: Voting + live results. Per-option counts and own-vote flag, single or multi-choice, optional closed (results-only) state. Mirrors the reaction-bar author-owned-state pattern: presentational; emits poll-wc:vote; author calls setCount after the server confirms.

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description: Group label (defaults to question text if a slot is provided, else "Poll")

attributes.name: data-hide-counts
attributes.description: Suppress the numeric count beside each bar

events.name: poll-wc:vote
events.description: Single-choice: switching options emits a remove for the previously-selected option BEFORE the add.

properties.name: setCount
properties.description: Update a single option after the server confirms

properties.name: setCounts
properties.description: Bulk-update counts; opts.mine accepts a string or string[]

childAttributes.name: data-mine
childAttributes.description: Current user voted for this option
